1.description: retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class in Trondheim municipality

4.description: find parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT omrade, kommunenummer FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((minx miny, minx maxy, maxx maxy, maxx miny, minx miny))', 25833)) AND skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = 'Høy'

1.description: retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct risk class values to confirm high risk class code

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class filtered by Trondheim municipality geometry

5.description: find parcels intersecting high risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teig

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

1.sql: SELECT omrade, kommunenummer FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct risk class values to confirm high risk class code

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class filtered by Trondheim municipality geometry

5.description: find parcels intersecting high risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: deduplicate to one row per parcel

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
